app.name: Moku
app.one_liner: A fast, minimal manga reader frontend for Suwayomi-Server built with Tauri and Svelte.

screens.name: Discover
screens.purpose: Browse and install extensions from Suwayomi sources to expand manga availability.

screens.name: Library
screens.purpose: Display manga organized into user-defined or synced Suwayomi categories (folders) with sorting and filtering options.

screens.name: Reader
screens.purpose: Render manga pages with configurable layout (single page, long strip), zoom, fit modes, and navigation controls.
primary_actions: Navigate to next/previous page or chapter

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Configure app behavior including server connection, themes, security, and Discord Rich Presence.
primary_actions: Configure basic auth or app lock
Set theme or import custom theme

screens.name: Tracker
screens.purpose: Sync reading progress with external tracking services like AniList, MyAnimeList, and Kitsu.

rust_commands.name: apply_folder_sort_filter
rust_commands.purpose: Apply per-folder sorting (e.g., by unread count, A–Z) and filtering (e.g., by publication status).

rust_commands.name: authenticate_basic_auth
rust_commands.purpose: Handle basic authentication when connecting to password-protected Suwayomi instances.

rust_commands.name: launch_suwayomi_server
rust_commands.purpose: Optionally start the bundled Suwayomi-Server in the background on app launch.

rust_commands.name: move_manga_selection
rust_commands.purpose: Move multiple selected manga items between folders using multi-select mode.

rust_commands.name: toggle_discord_rpc
rust_commands.purpose: Enable or disable Discord Rich Presence showing current manga and chapter status.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add reader screen with page navigation and fit modes
week 1: Implement basic manga list view with folder tabs
week 1: Integrate Tauri with Suwayomi GraphQL API for library fetching
week 2: Add settings screen with theme selector
week 2: Enable per-folder sorting and filtering logic
week 3: Add basic auth support for remote servers
week 3: Implement tracker sync UI stubs
week 3: Integrate Discord Rich Presence command
week 4: Add app lock and proxy configuration
week 4: Build theme editor with import/export
week 4: Write acceptance tests for core reading flow
acceptance_tests: Basic auth credentials are accepted and allow connection to a secured Suwayomi instance.
Multi-select mode allows moving 5 manga items from 'Reading' to 'Completed' folder in one action.
RTL reader correctly advances one page at a time when pressing right arrow key.
User can enable Discord Rich Presence and see current manga title and chapter in Discord status.
User can independently sort one folder by 'unread chapters' while another remains sorted by 'A–Z'.
